extract: Floaroma Town (Japanese: ソノオタウン Sonoo Town) is a town in the Sinnoh region, known for its honey and vividly scented flowers that grow everywhere. It is the first area where Berries from non-player characters are available in Generation IV. Notable landmarks of the town include the Pick a Peck of Colors Flower Shop at its center and the Floaroma Meadow found to the north. In Pokémon Platinum, Floaroma Town has wooden arches at its entrances. Floaroma Town is bordered to the south by Route 204, the east by Route 205, and to the north by Fuego Ironworks (though not directly accessible from Floaroma Town itself).
